## Security / privacy checklist

- [ ] No API keys, tokens, or real private URLs in commits
- [ ] No user media (images/video bytes) in logs, fixtures, or screenshots
- [ ] If logging/reporting changed: no sensitive data in new output
- [ ] If touching sensitive-review behavior or examples: [docs/admin/configuration.md](../docs/admin/configuration.md) and [docs/guides/dashboard.md](../docs/guides/dashboard.md) constraints respected

**Sensitive-review impact (if any):** e.g. `none` / `docs only` / `behavior change`


## Screenshots / logs

- **Do not** attach real personal media. Synthetic or redacted only.
